title: Amazon UK Shoes Reviews
subtitle: Customer Sentiment and Feedback on Footwear Products
description: This dataset contains customer reviews for various shoes on Amazon, including product names, review text, ratings, purchase verification, and helpfulness counts.

files.name: amazon_shoe_reviews.csv
files.description: Amazon customer reviews for various shoe products.

columns.name: url
columns.description: The direct link to the product page on Amazon.

columns.name: product_name
columns.description: The name and details of the shoe product being reviewed.

columns.name: reviewer_name
columns.description: The name of the reviewer who left the review.

columns.name: review_title
columns.description: A concise title summarizing the reviewer's experience or opinion of the product.

columns.name: review_text
columns.description: The full review written by the reviewer, describing their experience with the product.

columns.name: review_rating
columns.description: The star rating given by the reviewer, ranging from 1 (lowest) to 5 (highest).

columns.name: verified_purchase
columns.description: Indicates whether the review was left by a verified buyer (TRUE/FALSE).

columns.name: review_date
columns.description: The date on which the review was posted.

columns.name: helpful_count
columns.description: The number of people who found the review helpful.

columns.name: uniq_id
columns.description: A unique identifier for the review.

columns.name: scraped_at
columns.description: The timestamp when the review was scraped from the website.
